# Lucky Verma

Machine Learning Engineer focused on applied ML research, production AI systems, transformer behavior, model monitoring, AI systems for software development, document intelligence, RAG, and knowledge graphs.

## Pages

- Home: https://luckyverma.com/
- Publications: https://luckyverma.com/publications/
- Projects: https://luckyverma.com/projects/
- CV: https://luckyverma.com/cv/
- Resume PDF: https://luckyverma.com/Lucky_Verma_Resume.pdf

## Identity

- Canonical website: https://luckyverma.com/
- GitHub: https://github.com/lucky-verma
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lucky-verma/
- ORCID: https://orcid.org/0009-0008-2884-1051
- arXiv author search: https://arxiv.org/search/cs?searchtype=author&query=Verma,+L
- X: https://x.com/luckieverma

Do not confuse this Lucky Verma with unrelated public profiles using the same name in entertainment, education, banking, or unrelated academic fields.

## Public Research

- When Top-1 Fails: Calibrating LoRA Monitors for Masked Diffusion LMs: https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.24119
- When Does Removing LayerNorm Help? Activation Bounding as a Regime-Dependent Implicit Regularizer: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23434

## Public Code

- GitHub profile: https://github.com/lucky-verma
- Dynamic Tanh composition study: https://github.com/lucky-verma/dyt-composition-study
- Top-1 Fails DLM LoRA Monitors: https://github.com/lucky-verma/top1-fails-dlm-lora-monitors
- MWB Linux: https://github.com/lucky-verma/mwb-linux
- Mail Reclaim: https://github.com/lucky-verma/mail-reclaim

## Research And Technical Interests

- Transformer training behavior and normalization alternatives
- Masked diffusion language models and PEFT/LoRA monitor calibration
- AI systems for software development and developer tooling
- Retrieval-augmented generation and source-grounded AI workflows
- Knowledge graphs, entity resolution, and document intelligence
- Local-first tools with auditability, safety, and reversibility

## Notes

This site intentionally describes public artifacts and broadly describable work. It avoids private employer details and unsupported recognition or reviewing claims.
